testcase.name: testIxigoFlow[{lastName=Automation, firstName=Test User One, cvv=123, ToCity=Kolkata, FromCity=New Delhi, exp=12/30, Mobile=9340299487, cardNumber=4111111111111111, DepartDate=2026-06-15}](1)

failure.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (88, 208). Other element would receive the click:
...

SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. Jun 08, 2026 9:50:11 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 Jun 08, 2026 9:50:11 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.217. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.system-err: Jun 08, 2026 9:50:44 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 Jun 08, 2026 9:50:44 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.217. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
